name: QRadar Audit: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source
notes: This rule reports repeated authentication failures from the same source IP address on the QRadar web interface or the CLI.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of SIM Audit
when the event QID is one of the following (28250383) Login Failed Audit Event
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source IP in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source IP in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of SIM Audit
AND when the event QID is one of the following (28250383) Login Failed Audit Event
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source IP in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source on QRadar
Event description: Authentication failures from the same source IP more than 5 times in 5 minutes
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
